response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse projects, with excellent alignment to open-source, Linux, and architecture; however, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there is limited evidence of formal project management or team leadership at an executive level, raising concerns about readiness for the strategic and communication demands of the role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with GISCollective and DLang libraries, demonstrating passion for open-source and digital sovereignty.
Proven full-stack expertise across Linux, Python-adjacent ecosystems (Node.js, Docker), and high-performance systems design.
Strong track record of mentoring, workshops, and community leadership, indicating natural ability to guide teams.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' — falls significantly short of the required C1 level.
Lacks explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML modeling, or formal requirements management in professional contexts.
No clear demonstration of executive-level leadership or operational oversight of multiple client projects in an IT consulting setting.
